name: sloth-skill-tree
description: Cyber Sloth Empire skills marketplace — 12 divisions, 120+ specialist skills for development, design, marketing, and operations

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-design
plugins.description: Sloth Flow design division — UI/UX design, brand guardianship, visual storytelling, accessibility, and AI image prompt engineering.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-engineering
plugins.description: Sloth Flow engineering division — 13 specialized agents for frontend, backend, mobile, AI, DevOps, security, and more. Part of the Cyber Sloth plugin family.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-gamedev
plugins.description: Sloth Flow game development division — game design, level design, narrative design, technical art, audio engineering, Unity, Unreal Engine, and Godot development.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-marketing
plugins.description: Sloth Flow marketing division — 11 specialized agents for growth, content, social media, SEO, and platform-specific strategy. Part of the Cyber Sloth plugin family.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-paid-media
plugins.description: Sloth Flow paid media division — campaign auditing, ad creative strategy, paid social, PPC, programmatic buying, search query analysis, and conversion tracking.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-product
plugins.description: Sloth Flow product division — sprint prioritization, user feedback synthesis, market trend research, and behavioral nudge design.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-project-mgmt
plugins.description: Sloth Flow project management division — senior PM oversight, studio production, operations planning, Jira workflows, risk management, and experiment tracking.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-spatial
plugins.description: Sloth Flow spatial computing division — Metal GPU rendering, visionOS development, XR immersive experiences, spatial UI/UX, cockpit interfaces, and terminal integration.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-specialized
plugins.description: Sloth Flow specialized division — agent orchestration, developer advocacy, cultural intelligence, AI model QA, compliance auditing, data analytics, data consolidation, report distribution, and accounts payable.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-suite
plugins.description: Sloth Flow core orchestrator — voice personas, brand tokens, agent registry, and cross-division workflow commands for the Cyber Sloth plugin family.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-support
plugins.description: Sloth Flow support division — customer support, analytics reporting, finance tracking, infrastructure maintenance, legal compliance, and executive summaries.

plugins.name: cyber-sloth-testing
plugins.description: Sloth Flow testing division — 8 specialized agents for QA, accessibility, API testing, performance, and test analysis. Part of the Cyber Sloth plugin family.
